holdings.infoBox: UPSD is an equity ETF with a total of 105 individual holdings. The top holdings are RCXTSOA6 TRS 052627 stock at 49.81%, RCXTSOA6 TRS 090826 at 47.81%, Apple at 5.01%, NVIDIA at 4.99%, and Microsoft at 2.90%.

overview.description: The Aptus Large Cap Upside ETF (UPSD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of large-cap US companies selected for their quality, value, and growth characteristics. It seeks enhanced total returns by layering additional return drivers. UPSD was launched on Nov 20, 2024 and is issued by Aptus Capital Advisors.
